meta.phase-name: Model Tree Selection and Multi-Model Overlay

phase-plan.purpose: Unify model-space selection around the model tree and support simultaneous model-space visualization.
phase-plan.scope: Remove duplicate model dropdown in controls, rename Space Features to Features, add model checkboxes in model tree for multi-select, and render selected model spaces as overlays in 3D.

file.description: Model-tree selection flow, multi-model state, and 3D model-space overlays.
